% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for beijing_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u7,axiom,
    located_in(beijing,northern_china)).

cnf(u9,negated_conjecture,
    ~located_in(beijing,southern_china)).

cnf(u8,axiom,
    ~located_in(X0,southern_china) | ~located_in(X0,northern_china)).

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for beijing_neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for beijing_neg.tptp
1. located_in(beijing,northern_china) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (located_in(X0,northern_china) => ~located_in(X0,southern_china)) [input(axiom)]
3. ~located_in(beijing,southern_china) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~~located_in(beijing,southern_china) [negated conjecture 3]
5. located_in(beijing,southern_china) [flattening 4]
6. ! [X0] : (~located_in(X0,southern_china) | ~located_in(X0,northern_china)) [ennf transformation 2]
7. located_in(beijing,northern_china) [cnf transformation 1]
8. ~located_in(X0,southern_china) | ~located_in(X0,northern_china) [cnf transformation 6]
9. located_in(beijing,southern_china) [cnf transformation 5]
10. ~located_in(beijing,northern_china) [resolution 8,9]
11. $false [forward subsumption resolution 10,7]
% SZS output end Proof for beijing_neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
